idea-plugin.name: Project Include Hierarchy
idea-plugin.description:
Adds a Project Include Hierarchy view for C/C++/Objective-C files in CLion.

  • Scope dropdown — reuse any IntelliJ scope (Project Files, custom scopes from Settings → Scopes, etc.) so "Expand All" doesn't drown in system headers.
  • Flat list toggle — collapse the tree into a deduplicated alphabetical list of all unique includes reachable through the current scope.
  • Filter field — type to keep only nodes whose name matches; parents of matches stay visible.

Open via Navigate → Project Include Hierarchy or the editor context menu while a C/C++ file is open. The result is rendered in the standard Hierarchy tool window, so Export to Text File, Refresh, Sort Alphabetically and navigation all work as usual.

action.description: Show the include hierarchy filtered by scope, with flat-list and name filter
Set the include hierarchy filter to the selected file's name
